label: Prioritise
description: Surface highest-risk or most urgent items first

label: Locate
description: Find or retrieve a specific record, patient, or item

label: Forecast
description: Look ahead — capacity, demand, or performance outlook

label: Validate
description: Check data quality, compliance, or readiness

label: Explain Variance
description: Why is performance different from plan?

label: Risk & Escalation
description: Surface pressure, risk indicators, and escalation needs

label: Co-ordinate Work
description: Align people, tasks, or handovers across teams

label: Conversational
description: General query, smalltalk, or meta question
